\tzpentry{ID3293}{Modal Frequency Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3293 introduces Modal Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \frac{ \omega_{n+1}}{ \omega_n} \to \phi = \frac{1+ \sqrt{5}}{2} \text{ (golden ratio)} \end{equation}
